free_text: -ANGULAR DEPENDENCE OF THE BEAM AND TARGET ANALYZING
POWERS A00N0 AND A000N IN NP ELASTIC SCATTERING
BETWEEN 0.477 AND 0.940 GEV.
SATURNE NATIONAL LAB. J.B., PH.C., M.C.,
J.M.F., R.K., M.C.L., J.L.S. AND EXPERIMENTAL SITE.
DAPNIA. J.B., C.D.L., F.L., A.DE L., M.DE M.,
F.P.-K. AND L.VAN R.
P.B., PH.D., G.G., R.H., D.R. AND PH.S.
J.P.G.
R.B., A.K., E.R. AND H.S.
L.S.B., Z.J., B.A.K. AND YU.A.U.
D.L. AND H.S.
THE SATURNE II SYNCHROTRON
POLARIZED NEUTRONS WERE PRODUCED BY BREAK-UP OF
VECTOR-POLARIZED DEUTERONS ON A 20 CM THICK BERYLLIUM
TARGET.
THE ION SOURCE PRODUCED VERTICALLY VECTOR-
POLARIZED DEUTERONS. THE SPIN WAS FLIPPED EVERY
ACCELERATOR SPILL.
THE SACLAY POLARIZED FROZEN-SPIN PROTON TARGET,
WHICH IS 35 MM THICK, 40 MM WIDE AND 49 MM HIGH. THE
VERTICAL PROTON POLARIZATION WAS 85 PERCENT. THE
TARGET POLARIZATION WAS MAINTAINED WITH A VERTICAL
MAGNETIC FIELD OF 0.33 TESLA. THE TARGET POLARIZATION
WAS INVERTED EVERY FEW HOURS.
.THE NEUTRON BEAM ENERGY SPREAD WAS ABOUT +/- 20 MEV.
THE POLARIZATION OF THE NEUTRONS WAS DETERMINED TO
0.59. THE POLARIZATION WAS CHECKED BY MEASURING ALSO
THE BREAK-UP PROTON SPIN, USING A BEAM POLARIMETER.
CANDIDATES FOR GOOD EVENTS WERE DETER-
MINED AND SELECTED BY FIVE DIFFERENT PRETRIGGERS.
OUTGOING PARTICLES, PROTONS OR NEU-
TRONS, WERE DETECTED BY A TWO-ARM SPECTROMETER, WHICH
COMPRISES SINGLE SCINTILLATION COUNTERS, COUNTER HODO-
SCOPES, A NEUTRON COUNTER HODOSCOPE WITH 15 SCINTILLA-
TING BARS AND A VETO DETECTOR, AN ANALYZING MAGNET AND
EIGHT MULTIWIRE PROPORTIONAL CHAMBERS. THE EFFICIENCY
OF THE NEUTRON COUNTER HODOSCOPE IS 15 - 20 PERCENT.
THE NEUTRON BEAM INTENSITY WAS MONITORED USING
A SCINTILLATION COUNTER ARRAY INSERTED IN THE BEAM IN
FRONT OF THE TARGET.
.A POLARIZED FROZEN-SPIN PROTON TARGET. FOR SOME OF THE
MEASUREMENTS, AN UNPOLARIZED 10 MM THICK SLAB OF POLY-
ETHYLENE, LOCATED DOWNSTREAM THE MAIN TARGET, WAS
USED.
THE ERRORS GIVEN ARE STATISTICAL ERRORS
ONLY. IN ADDITION, THERE IS AN UNCERTAINTY IN THE
TARGET POLARIZATION OF +/- 3 PERCENT.
.DATA TAKEN FROM MAIN REF.
N.O.
ANALYZING POWER DUE TO POLARIZED BEAM, A00N0.
ANALYZING POWER DUE TO POLARIZED TARGET, A000N.
WEIGHTED AVERAGE OF A00N0 AND A000N.
A00N0 VALUES MEASURED WITH THE ADDITIONAL POLY-
ETHYLENE SAMPLE.
.DATA WERE TAKEN FROM TABLES 1 - 7 OF MAIN REF.
N.O.
